mapper.select: /* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrTrgtList */ SELECT DISTINCT JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , CASE WHEN TO_DATE(JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > SYSDATE THEN 'I' ELSE 'C' END AS workCd , JFI.SOC AS insrProdCd , IIM.INSR_TYPE_CD AS insrTypeCd , JFI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS strtDttm , JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE AS endDttm , JFI.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS reqinday , CASE WHEN REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0', '3', '5', '7') THEN '2' WHEN REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '3' END AS chnCd /* 가입채널(1:대리점, 2:온라인, 3:고객센터) */ , DECODE(DCA.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM') AS reqBuyType , JSI.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS openDt , SUBSTR(MAX(DCA.APPL_STRT_DTTM) OVER(PARTITION BY DCA.CONTRACT_NUM), 0, 8) AS dvcChgDt , CASE WHEN REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0', '3', '5', '7') AND REQ.INSR_AUTH_INFO IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS clauseFlag FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST GCM , MSP_INTM_INSR_MST IIM , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO JFI , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST DCA , (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, ON_OFF_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, INSR_AUTH_INFO FROM (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, ON_OFF_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, INSR_AUTH_INFO, RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY REQ_IN_DAY DESC) AA FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21' ) WHERE AA = 1 ) REQ WHERE GCM.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND GCM.CD_VAL = IIM.INSR_PROD_CD AND GCM.CD_VAL = JFI.SOC AND JFI.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 6/60/24, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND JFI.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = DCA.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND DCA.REQUEST_KEY(+) IS NOT NULL AND DCA.APPL_END_DTTM(+) >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM

/* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrTrgtListDaily */ SELECT DISTINCT IIR.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , IIR.WORK_CD AS workCd , IIR.INSR_PROD_CD AS insrProdCd , IIR.INSR_TYPE_CD AS insrTypeCd , IIR.STRT_DTTM AS strtDttm , IIR.END_DTTM AS endDttm , IIR.REQ_IN_DAY AS reqInDay , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST@DL_MCP WHERE 1 = 1 AND REQ_TYPE = 'IS' AND CONTRACT_NUM = IIR.CONTRACT_NUM AND TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = SUBSTR(IIR.REQ_IN_DAY, 0, 8)) > 0 THEN '4' WHEN REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0', '3', '5', '7') THEN '2' WHEN REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '3' END AS chnCd /* 가입채널(1:대리점, 2:온라인, 3:고객센터) */ , DECODE(DCA.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM') AS reqBuyType , JSI.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS openDt , SUBSTR(MAX(DCA.APPL_STRT_DTTM) OVER(PARTITION BY DCA.CONTRACT_NUM), 0, 8) AS dvcChgDt , CASE WHEN REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0', '3', '5', '7') AND REQ.INSR_AUTH_INFO IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS clauseFlag FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_READY IIR , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST DCA , (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, ON_OFF_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, INSR_AUTH_INFO FROM (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, ON_OFF_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, INSR_AUTH_INFO, RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY REQ_IN_DAY DESC) AA FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21' ) WHERE AA = 1 ) REQ WHERE IIR.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIR.CONTRACT_NUM = DCA.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND DCA.REQUEST_KEY(+) IS NOT NULL AND DCA.APPL_END_DTTM(+) >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND IIR.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIR.PROC_CD = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = IIR.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_PROD_CD = IIR.INSR_PROD_CD AND STRT_DTTM = IIR.STRT_DTTM AND END_DTTM = IIR.END_DTTM )

/* intmInsrMapper.getDvcChgModelInfo */ SELECT A.MODEL_NM AS modelNm , A.MODEL_ID AS modelId , A.INTM_SRL_NO AS intmSrlNo FROM (SELECT MODEL_NM, MODEL_ID, INTM_SRL_NO, RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY APPL_STRT_DTTM DESC) RANK FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND REQUEST_KEY IS NOT NULL AND APPL_END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) A WHERE RANK = 1
mapper.insert: /* intmInsrMapper.insertIntmInsrCanInfoOvr */ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO ( INSR_CAN_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , NCN , CTN , CUST_ID , CAN_RSLT_CD , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT INSR_CAN_NUM_SEQ.NEXTVAL , IIO.CONTRACT_NUM , IIO.INSR_PROD_CD , IIO.STRT_DTTM , IIO.END_DTTM , JSI.SVC_CNTR_NO , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO , JSI.CUSTOMER_ID , 'OVR' , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER IIO , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI WHERE IIO.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIO.IF_TRGT_CD = 'N' AND IIO.INSR_STAT_CD = '1' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(TO_DATE(IIO.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) + 6

/* intmInsrMapper.insertIntmInsrCanInfoLtl */ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO ( INSR_CAN_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , NCN , CTN , CUST_ID , CAN_RSLT_CD , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT INSR_CAN_NUM_SEQ.NEXTVAL , IIM.CONTRACT_NUM , IIM.INSR_PROD_CD , IIM.STRT_DTTM , IIM.END_DTTM , JSI.SVC_CNTR_NO , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO , JSI.CUSTOMER_ID , IIM.CAN_RSLT_CD , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER IIM , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI WHERE IIM.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIM.INSR_STAT_CD = '0' AND IIM.CAN_RSLT_CD = 'LTL' AND IIM.END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = IIM.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_PROD_CD = IIM.INSR_PROD_CD AND STRT_DTTM = IIM.STRT_DTTM)
mapper.select: /* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrCanInfoList */ SELECT INSR_CAN_NUM AS SEQ_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND CD_VAL = INSR_PROD_CD) AS INSR_PROD_NM , NCN , CTN , CUST_ID , CAN_RSLT_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO WHERE PROC_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: /* intmInsrMapper.expireIntmInsrOrder */ UPDATE MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER SET IF_TRGT_CD = 'F' , RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE IF_TRGT_CD = 'N' AND INSR_STAT_CD = '1' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(TO_DATE(REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) + 6
mapper.select: /* intmInsrMapper.getExpireIntmInsrMemberList */ SELECT MEM.INSR_MEMBER_NUM AS INSR_MEMBER_NUM , MEM.INSR_PROD_CD AS INSR_PROD_CD , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND CD_VAL = MEM.INSR_PROD_CD) AS INSR_PROD_NM , MEM.CTN AS CTN , MEM.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER MEM , MSP_INTM_INSR_MST MST WHERE MEM.INSR_PROD_CD = MST.INSR_PROD_CD AND INSR_STAT_CD = '1' AND TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(MEM.STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), MST.INSR_ENGG_CNT)) = TRUNC(TO_DATE(MEM.END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= TO_DATE(END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

/* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrDeleteTrgtList */ SELECT IIM.INSR_MEMBER_NUM AS INSR_MEMBER_NUM , JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE AS END_DTTM FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER IIM , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO JFI WHERE IIM.CONTRACT_NUM = JFI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIM.STRT_DTTM = JFI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AND IIM.INSR_PROD_CD = JFI.SOC AND IIM.INSR_STAT_CD != '2' AND IIM.END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE AND JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1/24/60/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') --AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = JFI.CONTRACT_NUM AND SOC = JFI.SOC AND EXPIRATION_DATE >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = JFI.CONTRACT_NUM AND SOC = JFI.SOC AND EFFECTIVE_DATE = JFI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AND TO_DATE(EXPIRATION_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) )
mapper.insert: /* intmInsrMapper.insertIntmInsrIfOut */ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_IF_OUT ( INSR_OUT_NUM , INSR_MEMBER_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , INSR_STAT_CD , CHN_CD , INSR_EVNT_CD , OPEN_DT , INSR_CMPN_CD , CTN , CUST_NM , BIRTH_DT , BAN_ADDR , MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MODEL_NM , INTM_SRL_NO , OLD_YN , PRDT_LNCH_DT , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , CLAUSE_FLAG , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT INSR_OUT_NUM_SEQ.NEXTVAL , IIM.INSR_MEMBER_NUM , IIM.CONTRACT_NUM , IIM.INSR_PROD_CD , IIM.STRT_DTTM , IIM.END_DTTM , #{insrStatCd} , IIM.CHN_CD , DECODE(IIM.INSR_STAT_CD, '1', IIM.INSR_EVNT_CD, '2', '0') , IIM.OPEN_DT , 'D' , IIM.CTN , IIM.CUST_NM , IIM.BIRTH_DT , BAN.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , DTL.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , IIM.MODEL_NM , IIM.INTM_SRL_NO , IIM.OLD_YN , IIM.PRDT_LNCH_DT , IIM.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , IIM.CLAUSE_FLAG , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER IIM , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL , MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO BAN WHERE IIM.INSR_MEMBER_NUM = #{insrMemberNum} AND IIM.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIM.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.BAN = BAN.BAN
mapper.select: /* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrMcnTrgtList */ SELECT DISTINCT IIM.INSR_MEMBER_NUM AS INSR_MEMBER_NUM , JSH.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , JSH.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSH.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSH.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSH.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER IIM , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST JSH WHERE IIM.CONTRACT_NUM = JSH.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSH.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1/24/60/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND JSH.EVNT_CD IN ( 'MCN' ) AND IIM.END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND IIM.INSR_STAT_CD = '1'

/* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrChgTrgtList */ SELECT IIM.INSR_MEMBER_NUM AS INSR_MEMBER_NUM , SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER IIM , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI WHERE IIM.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIM.INSR_STAT_CD = '1' AND IIM.END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') MINUS SELECT INSR_MEMBER_NUM , CUST_NM , CTN , BIRTH_DT FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER WHERE INSR_STAT_CD = '1' AND END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT IIO.CONTRACT_NUM , IIO.INSR_PROD_CD , IIO.STRT_DTTM , IIO.END_DTTM , IIO.INSR_STAT_CD , IIO.CHN_CD , IIO.INSR_EVNT_CD , DECODE(IIO.INSR_EVNT_CD, '2', IIO.DVC_CHG_DT, IIO.OPEN_DT) AS OPEN_DT , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , JSI.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT , IIO.MODEL_NM , IIO.MODEL_ID , IIO.INTM_SRL_NO , DECODE(IIM.INSR_TYPE_CD, '01', 'N', 'Y') AS OLD_YN , DECODE(IIM.INSR_TYPE_CD, '01', CIM.PRDT_LNCH_DT, '') AS PRDT_LNCH_DT , DECODE(IIM.INSR_TYPE_CD, '01', NVL((SELECT TO_CHAR(OUT_UNIT_PRIC) FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT WHERE IIO.MODEL_ID = RPRS_PRDT_ID AND IIO.STRT_DTTM BETWEEN UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM),''), '') AS OUT_UNIT_PRIC , IIM.CMPN_LMT_AMT , IIO.CLAUSE_FLAG , IIM.INSR_TYPE_CD , (SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND CD_VAL = IIO.INSR_PROD_CD) AS TEMPLATE_ID , IIO.REQ_IN_DAY FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER IIO , MSP_INTM_INSR_MST IIM , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , CMN_INTM_MDL CIM WHERE IIO.IF_TRGT_CD = 'Y' AND IIO.INSR_PROD_CD = IIM.INSR_PROD_CD AND IIO.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIO.MODEL_ID = CIM.RPRS_PRDT_ID(+) AND CIM.RPRS_YN(+) = 'Y'
SELECT INSR_MEMBER_NUM_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS INSR_MEMBER_NUM FROM DUAL

/* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrIfOut */ SELECT INSR_OUT_NUM AS SEQ_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , OPEN_DT , DECODE(INSR_STAT_CD, '2', END_DTTM, STRT_DTTM) AS STRT_DTTM , INSR_STAT_CD , CTN , CUST_NM , BIRTH_DT , MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MODEL_NM , INTM_SRL_NO , BAN_ADDR , INSR_CMPN_CD , INSR_EVNT_CD , OLD_YN , PRDT_LNCH_DT , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , CLAUSE_FLAG , CHN_CD , CUST_TYPE FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_IF_OUT WHERE PROC_YN = 'N'

/* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrIfOutDB */ SELECT INSR_OUT_NUM AS SEQ_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , OPEN_DT , STRT_DTTM , INSR_STAT_CD , CTN , CUST_NM , BIRTH_DT , MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MODEL_NM , INTM_SRL_NO , BAN_ADDR , INSR_CMPN_CD , INSR_EVNT_CD , OLD_YN , PRDT_LNCH_DT , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , CLAUSE_FLAG , CHN_CD , CUST_TYPE FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_IF_OUT WHERE PROC_YN = 'N' AND INSR_STAT_CD = '1'
SELECT INSR_CMPN_NUM_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS INSR_CMPN_NUM FROM DUAL

/* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrOrderList */ SELECT DECODE(IIO.INSR_EVNT_CD, '2', IIO.DVC_CHG_DT, IIO.OPEN_DT) AS OPEN_DT , IIO.STRT_DTTM , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , JSI.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT , DTL.MINOR_AGENT_NAME AS MINOR_AGENT_NAME , IIO.MODEL_NM AS MODEL_NM , IIO.INTM_SRL_NO AS INTM_SRL_NO , BAN.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN AS BAN_ADDR , IIO.INSR_PROD_CD AS INSR_PROD_CD , 'D' AS INSR_CMPN_CD , IIO.INSR_EVNT_CD AS INSR_EVNT_CD , IIO.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM , IIO.CHN_CD AS CHN_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER IIO , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL , MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO BAN WHERE TRUNC(IIO.REGST_DTTM) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND IIO.IF_TRGT_CD = 'N' AND IIO.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIO.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.BAN = BAN.BAN

SELECT JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , JSI.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT , DTL.MINOR_AGENT_NAME AS MINOR_AGENT_NAME , IIO.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM , DECODE(IIO.VRFY_RSLT_CD, 'SNOK', TO_CHAR(SND_VRFY_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), END_DTTM) AS FAIL_DT , NVL(( SELECT CAN_RSLT_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = IIO.CONTRACT_NUM AND STRT_DTTM = IIO.STRT_DTTM AND TRUNC(PROC_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)), 'REQ') AS CAN_RSLT_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER IIO , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL WHERE TRUNC(TO_DATE(IIO.END_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) = TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AND IIO.IF_TRGT_CD IN ('F','C') AND IIO.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIO.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM

/* intmInsrMapper.getIntmInsrCanRetryList */ SELECT INSR_CAN_NUM AS SEQ_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND CD_VAL = INSR_PROD_CD) AS INSR_PROD_NM , NCN , CTN , CUST_ID , CAN_RSLT_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO_TEMP WHERE PROC_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: /* intmInsrMapper.insertIntmInsrReady */ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_READY ( CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , REQ_IN_DAY , INSR_TYPE_CD , WORK_CD , PROC_CD , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT DISTINCT JSI.CONTRACT_NUM , JFI.SOC , JFI.EFFECTIVE_DATE , JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE , JFI.EVNT_TRTM_DT , IIM.INSR_TYPE_CD , CASE WHEN TO_DATE(JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'I' ELSE 'C' END , 'N' , SYSDATE FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST GCM , MSP_INTM_INSR_MST IIM , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO JFI , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI WHERE GCM.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND GCM.CD_VAL = IIM.INSR_PROD_CD AND GCM.CD_VAL = JFI.SOC AND ((TO_DATE(JFI.EVNT_TRTM_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1/24/60/60 AND TO_DATE(JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > TRUNC(SYSDATE)) OR TO_DATE(JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1/24/60/60) AND JFI.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = JFI.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_PROD_CD = JFI.SOC AND STRT_DTTM = JFI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AND END_DTTM = JFI.EXPIRATION_DATE )

/* intmInsrMapper.insertIntmInsrCanInfoReady */ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO ( INSR_CAN_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , NCN , CTN , CUST_ID , CAN_RSLT_CD , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT INSR_CAN_NUM_SEQ.NEXTVAL , IIR.CONTRACT_NUM , IIR.INSR_PROD_CD , IIR.STRT_DTTM , IIR.END_DTTM , JSI.SVC_CNTR_NO , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO , JSI.CUSTOMER_ID , 'RDY' , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_READY IIR , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI WHERE IIR.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIR.PROC_CD = 'N' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(IIR.REGST_DTTM) + 3 AND TO_DATE(IIR.END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > SYSDATE
mapper.update: /* intmInsrMapper.updateIntmInsrReadyExp */ UPDATE MSP_INTM_INSR_READY SET PROC_CD = 'C' , PROC_DT = SYSDATE WHERE PROC_CD = 'N' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(REGST_DTTM) + 3
